requirement_topic.en: EEC Grid Connection — 230/400 V 50 Hz, IEC 62933, NRS-family alignment (unconfirmed)
requirement_topic.zh: EEC并网——230/400 V 50 Hz，IEC 62933，NRS系列标准对齐（未经确认）
requirement_topic.zht: EEC併網——230/400 V 50 Hz，IEC 62933，NRS系列標準對齊（未經確認）

summary.en: The Eswatini Electricity Company (EEC) is the national utility responsible for electricity transmission and distribution. ESERA (Eswatini Energy Regulatory Authority) is the energy sector regulator. Eswatini's grid operates at 230/400 V, 50 Hz — the 50 Hz frequency matches China, though the nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V. Because Eswatini is heavily interconnected with South Africa's Eskom grid and imports the majority of its electricity, grid-connection practice is understood to follow South African NRS (National Rationalised Specifications) standards, including NRS 048 (power quality) and NRS 057 (embedded generation). However, no confirmed public EEC or ESERA grid-connection technical specification for BESS has been identified as of the dataset date. Exporters must contact EEC and ESERA directly for current connection agreement terms. IEC 62933-2-1 and IEC 62933-5-2 are the internationally expected baseline references for BESS grid integration.
summary.zh: 埃斯瓦蒂尼电力公司（EEC）是负责输配电的国家电力公司。ESERA（埃斯瓦蒂尼能源监管局）是能源行业监管机构。埃斯瓦蒂尼电网运行电压为230/400 V、50 Hz——名义上与中国相同。由于埃斯瓦蒂尼与南非Eskom电网高度互联并大量进口电力，并网实践据悉遵循南非NRS（国家统一规范）标准，包括NRS 048（电能质量）和NRS 057（分布式发电）。然而，截至数据集日期，尚未找到EEC或ESERA针对BESS已确认的公开并网技术规格。出口商须直接联系EEC和ESERA获取现行并网协议条款。IEC 62933-2-1和IEC 62933-5-2是BESS并网集成的国际预期基准参考标准。
summary.zht: 埃斯瓦蒂尼電力公司（EEC）是負責輸配電的國家電力公司。ESERA（埃斯瓦蒂尼能源監管局）是能源行業監管機構。埃斯瓦蒂尼電網運行電壓為230/400 V、50 Hz——名義上與中國相同。由於埃斯瓦蒂尼與南非Eskom電網高度互聯並大量進口電力，併網實踐據悉遵循南非NRS（國家統一規範）標準，包括NRS 048（電能品質）和NRS 057（分散式發電）。然而，截至資料集日期，尚未找到EEC或ESERA針對BESS已確認的公開併網技術規格。出口商須直接聯繫EEC和ESERA獲取現行併網協議條款。IEC 62933-2-1和IEC 62933-5-2是BESS併網集成的國際預期基準參考標準。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62933-2-1:2017 (Electrical energy storage — Unit parameters and testing methods)
IEC 62933-5-2:2020 (Electrical energy storage — Safety requirements for grid-integrated systems)
NRS 048 (South African power quality standard — likely reference for Eswatini)
NRS 057 (South African embedded generation standard — likely reference for Eswatini)
ESERA Act (Eswatini Energy Regulatory Authority enabling legislation — specific provisions unconfirmed)
EEC grid connection agreement (no confirmed public BESS-specific specification as of 2026-06-14)

summary.en: Chinese BESS manufacturers typically hold grid-connection certificates under GB/T 36558-2023 (Technical requirements for grid connection of electrochemical energy storage systems) and GB/T 34120-2017 (Technical specification for energy storage converters). China's grid operates at 220/380 V, 50 Hz — the nominal voltage differs from Eswatini's 230/400 V, though the 50 Hz frequency matches. GB/T 36558 compliance and NEA (National Energy Administration) approvals are not accepted as substitutes for EEC or ESERA connection approval. The voltage difference, while modest, may require PCS (power conversion system) firmware parameter adjustments and retesting to confirm compliance with EEC's actual connection requirements.
summary.zh: 中国BESS制造商通常持有GB/T 36558-2023（电化学储能系统并网技术要求）和GB/T 34120-2017（储能变流器技术规范）下的并网证书。中国电网运行电压为220/380 V、50 Hz——标称电压与埃斯瓦蒂尼的230/400 V不同，但50 Hz频率一致。GB/T 36558合规和国家能源局（NEA）批准不被接受为EEC或ESERA并网批准的替代依据。电压差虽不大，但可能需要对PCS（储能变流器）固件参数进行调整并重新测试，以确认符合EEC的实际并网要求。
summary.zht: 中國BESS製造商通常持有GB/T 36558-2023（電化學儲能系統併網技術要求）和GB/T 34120-2017（儲能變流器技術規範）下的併網證書。中國電網運行電壓為220/380 V、50 Hz——標稱電壓與埃斯瓦蒂尼的230/400 V不同，但50 Hz頻率一致。GB/T 36558合規和國家能源局（NEA）批准不被接受為EEC或ESERA併網批准的替代依據。電壓差雖不大，但可能需要對PCS（儲能變流器）固件參數進行調整並重新測試，以確認符合EEC的實際併網要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 (Technical requirements for grid connection of electrochemical energy storage systems)
GB/T 34120-2017 (Technical specification for energy storage converters)
NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical requirements for battery energy storage converter)

gap.en: CRITICAL (UNCONFIRMED FRAMEWORK). No confirmed public EEC or ESERA BESS-specific grid-connection technical specification has been identified. Key gaps: (1) GB/T grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals do not satisfy EEC or ESERA requirements — these bodies must be engaged directly for current connection terms; (2) voltage difference (220/380 V China vs 230/400 V Eswatini) requires PCS firmware reconfiguration and verification; (3) if NRS 048 and NRS 057 apply by reference (likely given Eskom interconnection), exporters must provide evidence of compliance with those South African standards — confirm with EEC directly; (4) IEC 62933-2-1 and IEC 62933-5-2 evidence should be prepared as the internationally expected baseline; (5) SCADA/comms protocol requirements (IEC 61850, DNP3, or project-specific) must be confirmed with the project owner and EEC.
gap.zh: 关键（框架未经确认）。目前尚未找到EEC或ESERA针对BESS的经确认公开并网技术规格。主要差距：（1）GB/T并网证书和国家能源局批准不满足EEC或ESERA要求——须直接联系这两个机构获取现行并网条款；（2）电压差（中国220/380 V vs 埃斯瓦蒂尼230/400 V）需要对PCS固件进行重新配置和验证；（3）如NRS 048和NRS 057通过参照适用（鉴于Eskom互联，可能如此），出口商须提供符合南非标准的证据——须直接向EEC确认；（4）应准备IEC 62933-2-1和IEC 62933-5-2证据作为国际预期基准；（5）须与项目业主和EEC确认SCADA/通信协议要求（IEC 61850、DNP3或项目专属协议）。
gap.zht: 關鍵（框架未經確認）。目前尚未找到EEC或ESERA針對BESS的經確認公開併網技術規格。主要差距：（1）GB/T併網證書和國家能源局批准不滿足EEC或ESERA要求——須直接聯繫這兩個機構獲取現行併網條款；（2）電壓差（中國220/380 V vs 埃斯瓦蒂尼230/400 V）需要對PCS固件進行重新配置和驗證；（3）如NRS 048和NRS 057通過參照適用（鑑於Eskom互聯，可能如此），出口商須提供符合南非標準的證據——須直接向EEC確認；（4）應準備IEC 62933-2-1和IEC 62933-5-2證據作為國際預期基準；（5）須與項目業主和EEC確認SCADA/通訊協議要求（IEC 61850、DNP3或項目專屬協議）。

mandatory_status.target: EEC grid-connection approval and ESERA licensing required; specific BESS technical specifications not confirmed publicly as of 2026-06-14
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 36558-2023 voluntary (mandatory for grid-connected projects in practice via NEA project approval)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 36558-2023 and GB/T 34120-2017 grid-connection credentials are not confirmed as acceptable to EEC or ESERA. No public BESS-specific grid-connection specification has been confirmed for Eswatini. Exporters must engage EEC and ESERA directly, prepare IEC 62933 evidence, verify NRS standard applicability, and recheck PCS parameters for 230/400 V operation before any connection agreement submission.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 36558-2023和GB/T 34120-2017并网证书未获EEC或ESERA确认接受。埃斯瓦蒂尼尚无经确认的公开BESS专项并网规格。出口商须直接联系EEC和ESERA，准备IEC 62933证据，核实NRS标准适用性，并在提交任何并网协议前重新核查PCS在230/400 V下的运行参数。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 36558-2023和GB/T 34120-2017併網證書未獲EEC或ESERA確認接受。埃斯瓦蒂尼尚無經確認的公開BESS專項併網規格。出口商須直接聯繫EEC和ESERA，準備IEC 62933證據，核實NRS標準適用性，並在提交任何併網協議前重新核查PCS在230/400 V下的運行參數。
